/CAL:DA 1203,2PC MOTION /X:DEFENDANT REFUSED TO COME TO COURT TODAY/CONT/DOPC/BAIL:5000/X:HEARING IN DEPT 30 ON 05-27-20 IS CONFIRMED/X:THE PEOPLE'S OFFER: CTS AND RELEASE, REINSTATE WITH AN EXPIRATION DATE OF 04-13-23/

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 30 D/CTS:30/WS/RESTV/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/X:THE DEFENDANT, HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN COURT NO, 20004355 & DISMISSED COUNTS 2-3 IN THIS CASE, IS ORDEREDTO PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT DETERMINED BY APD,/X:MATTER IS REFERREDTO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:05-27-20/OBEY/ACCEP/REMA/VD:PRELIMHRG OF 05-06-20/CONTD:05-27-20 FOR MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:APD/

/CAL:RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/TN:DONAVEN PATRICK STJOHN/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED,/CTORD:THAT THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 1 TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) IS GRANTED/FAWA/IRRC/TEXT: DEFT WAIVES INST AND ARRAIGNMENT NL PLEA/DEFT ADV ANNL:1/NOLO/
/CAL:RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X:PURSUANT TO THE BAILIFF, DEFENDANT IS TOO ILL TO ATTEND COURT TODAY,/NP/LD:05-12-20 (60TH)/CONTD:RETURNON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ON 04-14-20/DOPC/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/NTW60/NEGRPT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/RX/DTC/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD:THAT GOOD CAUSE IS FOUND FOR THE CONTINUANCE PURSUANT TO GC 68115 (COVID-19 & SF SHELTER-IN-PLACE POLICY)/DAWT/LD:04-06-20/CONTD:PRELIM HRG ON 04-03-20/DOPC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-27-20/987,2/ORMS/CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE PROOF OF SCHOOL ATTENDANCE AND PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT AT NEXT COURT APPEARANCE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
